creator: jcarchambeau@gmail.com
text:
The icmptypes mentioned in FreeBSD pf.conf manpage are not mentioned in the FreeBSD 6.1 icmp(4) manpage.

Fix: 

Append the OpenBSD 3.7 icmptype section for icmptype names to use in your pf rules or pf.conf file.  Consult the OpenBSD 3.7 manpage for icmptypes to use until committed to the manpages.
How-To-Repeat: man 4 icmp and look for icmp types to use in your pf.conf rules.
